'''''Wilsey''''' was a [[Lambda-class T-4a shuttle/Legends|''Lambda''-class T-4a shuttle]] that saw service with the [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel Alliance]] during the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]].

In an effort to acquire more intelligence about a secret [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] [[DS-1 Orbital Battle Station/Legends|military project]], the Alliance planned to capture several [[communications satellite]]s. Learning that some had been stolen from the Imperial base on [[Orron III]], the Alliance sent ''Wilsey'', under the escort of [[Keyan Farlander/Legends|Keyan Farlander]] flying a [[BTL Y-wing starfighter/Legends|BTL Y-wing starfighter]], to [[Ambush of the Phoenix|capture]] the [[BFF-1 bulk freighter/Legends|freighter]] [[Phoenix (BFF-1 bulk freighter)|''Phoenix'']].

When the ''Wilsey'' boarded and captured the ''Phoenix'', an Imperial force of shuttles and [[Delta-class DX-9 stormtrooper transport|transports]], arrived in an attempt to recapture the freighter. Farlander defeated this force, which allowed the ''Wilsey'' to escape into [[Hyperspace/Legends|hyperspace]] shortly before the arrival of the [[Imperial-class Star Destroyer/Legends|''Imperial''-class Star Destroyer]] [[Intrepid (Imperial I-class)|''Intrepid'']].
